MainSubTitle: Avoid worries when splitting expenses among friends
HeroSubtitle: Create an event, add expenses, and instantly see how much each person owes.
VersionsHint: Every change you save is recorded here. You can review the diff and restore any earlier state.
PrivacyHeadline: Your expenses, none of our business.
PrivacyBody: DivSplit runs entirely on your device, so your details and expenses stay private. No sign-ups, no email, no personal data — just simple, secure bill splitting.
MomentHeadline: Live the moment, we handle the math.
MomentBody: Don't let a calculator get in the way of your memories. DivSplit works out the simplest way to settle up, so you can focus on the trip, the dinner, the people.
TrustHeadline: No one can quietly rewrite the bill.
TrustBody: Every change anyone makes is saved as a reversible version and logged in the event history. If someone slips in an unfair charge or deletes a transaction that favored them, the whole group sees it — and anyone can restore the fair version in one tap. Trust, without accounts.
